hook: A therapy app promised to keep your secrets. Then it got fined $7.8 million.
vo: In 2023 the US FTC ordered BetterHelp to pay $7.8 million.
The reason: sharing users' sensitive mental-health data with Facebook for advertising.
The people who came to that app were asking for help. Not to be targeted.
onscreen_text: You came for help. Not to be a data point.
cta: Your data should stay yours. That's the whole idea behind Faresay.
broll_notes: Close-up of a phone screen showing a padlock icon slowly unlocking, then cutting to a blurred FTC press release headline. End on a plain, still shot of the Faresay wordmark on a neutral background.
